title: Anisotropic uncertainty principles for metaplectic operators
summary:
We establish anisotropic uncertainty principles (UPs) for general metaplectic operators acting on
  $L^2(\mathbb{R}^d)$, including degenerate cases associated with symplectic matrices whose
  $B$-block has nontrivial kernel. In this setting, uncertainty phenomena are shown to be intrinsically
  directional and confined to an effective phase-space dimension given by $\mathrm{rank}(B)$.
  First, we prove sharp Heisenberg-Pauli-Weyl type inequalities involving only the directions
  corresponding to $\ker(B)^\perp$, with explicit lower bounds expressed in terms of geometric
  quantities associated with the underlying symplectic transformation. We also provide a complete
  characterization of all extremizers, which turn out to be partially Gaussian functions with free
  behavior along the null directions of $B$.
  Building on this framework, we extend the Beurling-Hörmander theorem to the metaplectic
  setting, obtaining a precise polynomial-Gaussian structure for functions satisfying suitable
  exponential integrability conditions involving both $f$ and its metaplectic transform. Finally,
  we prove a Morgan-type (or Gel'fand--Shilov type) uncertainty principle for metaplectic operators,
  identifying a sharp threshold separating triviality from density of admissible functions and
  showing that this threshold is invariant under metaplectic transformations.
  Our results recover the classical Fourier case and free metaplectic transformations as special
  instances, and reveal the geometric and anisotropic nature of uncertainty principles in the
  presence of symplectic degeneracies.

AI.tldr: 建立了作用于L^2(ℝ^d)的一般metaplectic算子的各向异性不确定性原理，揭示了在辛退化情况下不确定性现象的方向性和有效相空间维度。
AI.motivation: 研究具有辛退化（B-块有非平凡核）的metaplectic算子的不确定性原理，探索在非满秩变换下不确定性现象的方向性特征和有效维度。
AI.techniques: 使用辛几何方法、Heisenberg-Pauli-Weyl型不等式、Beurling-Hörmander定理的推广、Morgan型（或Gel'fand-Shilov型）不确定性原理，以及极值函数的特征分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 尖锐的Heisenberg-Pauli-Weyl型不等式，仅涉及ker(B)^⊥方向；2. 极值函数的完全刻画（部分高斯函数）；3. Beurling-Hörmander定理在metaplectic框架下的推广；4. Morgan型不确定性原理，确定平凡性与可容许函数密度的阈值。
AI.significance: 揭示了辛退化情况下不确定性原理的几何和各向异性本质，将经典傅里叶变换和自由metaplectic变换作为特例，为相空间分析提供了新的理论框架。

title: Chemotactic Feedback Controls Patterning in Hybrid Tumor--Stroma Model
summary:
Motivated by an ongoing collaboration with clinical oncologists and pathologists, we develop a hybrid partial differential equation--ordinary differential equation (PDE--ODE) framework that captures (i) competition between susceptible and resistant phenotypes, (ii) stromal state switching, and (iii) a clinically realistic open-loop, single-dose therapeutic agent $I$ with diffusion and clearance.
  Clinical management of solid tumors is increasingly limited by spatial heterogeneity and therapy-induced resistance niches that are difficult to predict from well-mixed models. We establish a rigorous mathematical backbone with forward invariance of the nonnegative cone and global-in-time well-posedness. Exploiting the decoupled drug equation $\partial_t I=d_IΔI-γ_I I$, we prove a long-time reduction during washout and show that the damped base dynamics admit no diffusion-driven (Turing-type) instability. We then formulate a directionality--damping principle: unidirectional (open-loop) sensing yields at most transient focusing, whereas bidirectional (closed-loop) feedback reshapes the effective mobility and produces explicit thresholds separating stable homogeneity, finite-band patterning (resistance niche formation), and aggregation when strong parabolicity is violated. Reproducible simulations corroborate this classification and highlight when flux regularization is required for physical realism.

AI.tldr: 建立了一个混合PDE-ODE框架来研究肿瘤耐药性空间异质性，提出了方向性-阻尼原理来解释开环与闭环治疗对耐药灶形成的影响
AI.motivation: 临床肿瘤治疗面临空间异质性和治疗诱导耐药灶的挑战，传统均匀混合模型难以预测这些现象，需要建立考虑空间扩散的数学模型
AI.techniques: 混合PDE-ODE框架、非负锥的正向不变性证明、全局时间适定性分析、解耦药物方程分析、方向性-阻尼原理、图灵型不稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统的非负锥正向不变性和全局时间适定性；药物洗脱期的长时间简化；阻尼基动力学不存在扩散驱动不稳定性；建立了开环与闭环反馈对空间模式形成的分类阈值
AI.significance: 为临床肿瘤耐药性研究提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了开环与闭环治疗策略对耐药灶形成的不同影响，对个体化治疗策略设计有重要指导意义

title: Well-posedness of the Langmuir film problem
summary: We analyze the inviscid Langmuir layer--Stokesian subfluid (ILLSS) model for two-phase Langmuir monolayers coupled to a Stokes flow in the underlying subfluid. Eliminating the bulk variables, we reformulate the coupled three-dimensional system as an evolution on the film involving the Dirichlet-to-Neumann (DtN) operator. We identify the Fourier symbol of the DtN operator and show it coincides with that of the fractional Laplacian, which yields an explicit Fourier-multiplier representation and allows construction of the corresponding fundamental solution. Using this representation we express the surface velocity as a convolution of the fundamental solution with the interfacial curvature forcing and analyze its normal limit to derive a boundary integral equation for the moving curve. Independently, exploiting the DtN representation we establish a curve-shortening identity: the interfacial perimeter decreases monotonically and its time derivative is controlled by $\dot{H}^{1/2}(\mathbb{R}^2)$-norm of the surface velocity. Building on the boundary integral equation, we prove local well-posedness via maximal $L^2$-regularity for quasilinear parabolic systems, employing a DeTurck-type reparametrization, and show equivalence with the original ILLSS system. Finally, we introduce a linearly implicit parametric finite-element scheme which captures experimentally observed relaxation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 建立了Langmuir单层-亚流体耦合系统的数学理论框架，将三维问题简化为二维演化方程，并证明了局部适定性。
AI.motivation: 研究两相Langmuir单层与底层Stokes亚流体耦合的ILLSS模型，该模型描述界面动力学与亚流体相互作用的复杂系统。
AI.techniques: 使用Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子降维、分数阶拉普拉斯算子理论、边界积分方程方法、DeTurck型重参数化、拟线性抛物系统最大L^2正则性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1) DtN算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子符号等价；2) 曲线缩短恒等式；3) 边界积分方程表示；4) 局部适定性证明；5) 数值格式设计。
AI.significance: 为Langmuir单层动力学提供了严格的数学基础，建立了三维-二维降维方法，发展了界面演化方程的适定性理论，并设计了有效的数值模拟方法。

title: Stationary phase with Cauchy singularity. A critical point of signature $(+,-)$
summary: Asymptotic expressions for an integral appearing in the solution of a d-bar problem are presented. The integral is a solid Cauchy transform of a function with a rapidly oscillating phase with a small parameter $h$, $0<h\ll 1$. Whereas standard steepest descent approaches can be applied to the case where the stationary points of the phase $ω_{k}$, $k=1,\ldots, N$ are far from the singularity $ζ$ of the integrand, a polarization approach is proposed for the case that $|ζ-ω_{k}|<\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{h})$ for some $k$. In this case the problem is studied in $\mathbb{C}^{2}$ ($\tildeω:=\barω$ is treated as an independent variable) on steepest descent contours. An application of Stokes' theorem allows for a decomposition of the integral into three terms for which asymptotics expressions in terms of special functions are given.

AI.tldr: 提出了用于d-bar问题解中出现的积分渐近表达式，特别处理了相位驻点接近奇点的情形
AI.motivation: 研究d-bar问题解中出现的积分渐近行为，该积分是具有快速振荡相位的小参数h的固体柯西变换，标准最速下降法在驻点远离奇点时适用，但需要处理驻点接近奇点的临界情况
AI.techniques: 极化方法（将共轭变量视为独立变量）、复二维空间分析、最速下降路径、Stokes定理分解、特殊函数渐近展开
AI.main_theorems: 当相位驻点ω_k与奇点ζ满足|ζ-ω_k|<O(√h)时，通过极化方法将积分分解为三项，每项都可用特殊函数给出渐近表达式
AI.significance: 扩展了d-bar问题中振荡积分渐近分析的工具箱，为驻点接近奇点的临界情况提供了系统处理方法，在可积系统、随机矩阵理论等应用中有重要价值

title: Boundary regularity for parabolic systems with nonstandard $(p,q)$-growth conditions in smooth convex domains
summary:
We study the boundary regularity of local weak solutions to nonlinear parabolic systems of the form \begin{equation*}
  \partial_t u^i - \mathrm{div} \big( a(|Du|) Du^i \big)= f^i, \qquad i=1,\dots,N, \end{equation*} in a space-time cylinder $Ω_T = Ω\times (0,T)$, where $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$ ($n \geq 2$) is a bounded, convex $C^2$-domain and $T>0$. The inhomogeneity $f=(f^1,\dots,f^N)$ belongs to $L^{n+2+σ}(Ω_T,\mathbb{R}^N)$ for some $σ>0$. The coefficients $a\colon \mathbb{R}_{>0} \to \mathbb{R}_{>0}$ are of Uhlenbeck-type and satisfy a nonstandard $(p,q)$-growth condition with \[ 2 \leq p \leq q < p + \frac{4}{n+2}. \] Our main result establishes a local Lipschitz estimate up to the lateral boundary for any local weak solution that vanishes on the lateral boundary of the cylinder.

AI.tldr: 建立了非线性抛物系统在满足非标准(p,q)-增长条件下的Uhlenbeck型系数时，局部弱解在侧边界上的局部Lipschitz估计
AI.motivation: 研究非线性抛物系统在边界上的正则性，特别是当系数满足非标准(p,q)-增长条件时，弱解在侧边界上的Lipschitz连续性
AI.techniques: 使用Uhlenbeck型系数结构，处理非标准(p,q)-增长条件，应用边界正则性理论，可能涉及De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型估计和Campanato空间方法
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：对于满足给定条件的非线性抛物系统，任何在圆柱侧边界上消失的局部弱解，在侧边界附近具有局部Lipschitz连续性
AI.significance: 扩展了抛物系统边界正则性理论，处理了非标准增长条件，为更一般的非线性抛物系统提供了边界正则性结果

title: Convergence speed for the average density of eigenfunctions for singular Riemannian manifolds
summary: We consider a class of singular Riemannian metrics on a compact Riemannian manifold with boundary and the eigenfunctions of the corresponding Laplace-Beltrami operator. In our setting, the average density of eigenfunctions with eigenvalue less than $λ$ converges weakly to the uniform normalised measure on the boundary as $λ\to\infty$. In this work, we show a quantitative estimate on the speed of this convergence in the Wasserstein-sense in the transverse coordinate to the boundary.

AI.tldr: 建立了奇异黎曼度量下Laplace-Beltrami算子特征函数密度在边界上收敛到均匀测度的Wasserstein距离定量估计
AI.motivation: 研究紧致带边黎曼流形上奇异黎曼度量对应的Laplace-Beltrami算子的特征函数分布，特别是特征函数密度在边界上的渐近行为
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein距离度量收敛速度，分析特征函数在边界法向坐标上的分布，结合奇异度量下的谱分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了特征函数密度在边界法向坐标上收敛到均匀测度的Wasserstein距离定量估计，给出了收敛速度的明确界限
AI.significance: 为奇异黎曼度量下谱理论的定量分析提供了新工具，深化了对边界附近特征函数分布的理解，在几何分析和数学物理中有潜在应用

title: Ground state of indefinite coupled nonlinear Schrödinger systems
summary: In this paper, we study the ground state solutions of the following coupled nonlinear Schrödinger system (P) $-Δu_1-τ_1 u_1 =μ_1u_1^3+βu_1u_2^2$, $ -Δu_2-τ_2 u_2 =μ_2u_2^3+βu_1^2u_2$ in $Ω$, $u_1=u_2=0$ on $\partialΩ$, where $μ_1, μ_2>0$, $β>0$ and $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N (N\le3)$ is a bounded domain with smooth boundary. We are concerned with the indefinite case, i.e., $τ_1, τ_2$ are greater than or equal to the principal eigenvalue of $-Δ$ with the Dirichlet boundary datum. By delicate variational arguments, we obtain the existence of ground state solution to $(P)$, and also provide information on critical energy levels for coupling parameter $β$ in some ranges.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有不定符号系数的耦合非线性薛定谔系统的基态解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有不定符号系数（τ₁, τ₂大于等于Dirichlet边界条件下-Δ算子的主特征值）的耦合非线性薛定谔系统，这类系统在物理中描述Bose-Einstein凝聚等非线性波现象，不定系数情形具有特殊的数学挑战性。
AI.techniques: 精细的变分方法，通过构造适当的能量泛函和临界点理论，分析耦合参数β在不同范围内的临界能量水平。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统(P)基态解的存在性，并给出了耦合参数β在某些范围内的临界能量水平信息。
AI.significance: 扩展了耦合非线性薛定谔系统理论，处理了不定系数这一更具挑战性的情形，为研究Bose-Einstein凝聚等物理系统中的非线性相互作用提供了新的数学工具。

title: Generalized Logarithmic Sobolev Inequality by the JKO Scheme
summary: Using a discrete Bakry-{É}mery method based on the JKO scheme, relying on the dissipation of entropy and Fisher information along a discrete flow, we establish new generalized logarithmic Sobolev inequality for log-concave measures of the form $e^{-V} under strict convexity assumptions on $V$ . We then show how this method recovers some well-known inequalities. This approach can be viewed as interpolating between the Bakry-{É}mery method and optimal transport techniques based on geodesic convexity.

AI.tldr: 基于JKO格式的离散Bakry-Émery方法，通过熵和Fisher信息在离散流中的耗散，建立了严格凸势能下对数凹测度的广义对数Sobolev不等式
AI.motivation: 研究对数凹测度的泛函不等式，特别是对数Sobolev不等式，这是概率论、泛函分析和最优输运理论中的核心问题。传统方法包括Bakry-Émery的Γ2演算和基于测地凸性的最优输运技术，本文旨在发展一种介于两者之间的新方法。
AI.techniques: 离散Bakry-Émery方法，基于JKO（Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto）格式，分析熵和Fisher信息沿离散流的耗散行为。该方法结合了Γ2演算的思想和最优输运的离散时间逼近技术。
AI.main_theorems: 在严格凸势能V下，建立了形式为e^{-V}的对数凹测度的新广义对数Sobolev不等式。该方法能够恢复一些已知的不等式，验证了其有效性。
AI.significance: 提供了一种连接Bakry-Émery方法和最优输运技术的新框架，为泛函不等式的研究开辟了新途径。该方法可能在随机过程、信息理论和统计力学中有重要应用，特别是在离散时间或数值逼近的背景下。

title: Uniform $L^{\infty}$-boundedness for solutions of anisotropic quasilinear systems
summary: In this paper we obtain uniformly locally $L^{\infty}$-estimate of solutions to non-autonomous quasilinear system involving operators in divergence form and a family of nonlinearities that are allowed to grow also critically.

AI.tldr: 该论文获得了涉及发散形式算子和临界增长非线性项的非自治拟线性系统解的局部L∞估计
AI.motivation: 研究非自治拟线性系统，该系统包含发散形式算子和允许临界增长的非线性项族，需要获得解的一致局部有界性估计
AI.techniques: 使用发散形式算子的分析方法，处理临界增长非线性项的技术，可能涉及De Giorgi迭代、Moser迭代或相关正则性估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 获得了非自治拟线性系统解的一致局部L∞估计，即使非线性项允许临界增长
AI.significance: 为具有临界增长非线性项的拟线性系统提供了重要的正则性理论，扩展了椭圆型偏微分方程的解的有界性结果

title: Global $W^{2,1+ε}$ regularity for potentials of optimal transport of non-convex planar domains
summary: In this paper, we investigate the optimal transport problem when the source is a non-convex polygonal domain in $\mathbb{R}^2$. We show a global $W^{2,1+ε}$ estimate for potentials of optimal transport. Our method applies to a more general class of domains.

AI.tldr: 证明了当源域为二维非凸多边形时最优输运势函数的全局W^{2,1+ε}正则性估计
AI.motivation: 研究最优输运问题中源域为非凸多边形时的正则性理论，这是经典凸域情形的推广，具有重要的理论和应用价值
AI.techniques: 使用最优输运理论、几何测度论和非线性偏微分方程方法，特别是Monge-Ampère方程的正则性分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当源域为二维非凸多边形时，最优输运势函数具有全局W^{2,1+ε}正则性，且方法适用于更一般的域类
AI.significance: 扩展了最优输运正则性理论到非凸域情形，为相关几何分析和偏微分方程研究提供了新工具，在图像处理、计算几何等领域有应用前景

title: Multiplicity and concentration of dual solutions for a Helmholtz system
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in Z. Angew. Math. Phys
summary:
In this paper, we are concerned with the nonlinear Helmholtz system of Hamiltonian type \begin{equation*} \left\{\begin{array}{l} -Δu-k^2 u=P(x)|v|^{p-2}v,\quad \text{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N, \\ -Δv-k^2v=Q(x)|u|^{q-2}u,\quad \text{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N, \end{array} \right. \end{equation*} where $N\geq3$, $P,Q: \mathbb{R}^N\rightarrow \mathbb{R}$ are two positive continuous functions, the exponents $p,q>2$ satisfy $\frac{1}{p}+\frac{1}{q}>\frac{N-2}{N}$. First, we obtained the existence of a ground state solution via a dual variational method. Moreover, the concentration behavior of such dual ground state solutions is established
  as $k\rightarrow\infty$, where a rescaling technique and the generalized Birman-Schwinger operator are involved. In addition, we also investigated the relation between the number of solutions and the topology of the set of the global maxima of the functions $P$ and $Q$.

AI.tldr: 研究了非线性Helmholtz系统的哈密顿型方程组，建立了基态解的存在性、浓度行为及解的数量与系数函数拓扑结构的关系
AI.motivation: 研究全空间上的非线性Helmholtz系统，该系统具有哈密顿结构，系数函数P和Q为正连续函数，指数满足超临界条件，旨在解决此类系统解的存在性、渐近行为和拓扑性质
AI.techniques: 对偶变分方法、重标度技术、广义Birman-Schwinger算子、拓扑度理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 基态解的存在性定理；2. 当k→∞时基态解的浓度行为；3. 解的数量与系数函数P和Q全局最大值点集拓扑结构的关系
AI.significance: 发展了非线性Helmholtz系统的对偶变分理论，建立了浓度现象与系数函数几何性质的关联，为研究此类非紧问题提供了新的分析框架

title: Existence of spot and lane stationary solutions for an ant active matter PDE model
summary: This paper studies the existence of multiple non-trivial stationary solutions of a partial differential equation (PDE) model introduced in [3], motivated by collective ant behavior. Previous work suggested the presence of two types of non-trivial stationary solutions for this PDE system: spot and lane solutions. In this paper, we establish the existence of these families of solutions along a bifurcation sequence as the interaction strength grows, with progressively increasing numbers of clusters and parallel lanes, respectively. Finally, we show that, for small values of the anticipation parameter, the first bifurcating spot solutions are locally dynamically stable, while the lane solutions are unstable.

AI.tldr: 证明了描述集体蚁群行为的PDE模型存在多簇斑点和多车道类型的非平凡稳态解，并分析了其稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究描述集体蚁群行为的PDE模型中非平凡稳态解的存在性，该模型在先前工作中被提出，并预测了斑点和车道两种类型的解
AI.techniques: 使用分岔理论分析，随着相互作用强度增大，追踪解族的分岔序列，并应用线性稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 存在斑点解族和车道解族，随着相互作用强度增大，分别出现簇数递增的斑点和平行车道数递增的车道解；2) 对于小的预期参数，首次分岔的斑点解局部动态稳定，而车道解不稳定
AI.significance: 为集体动物行为模型提供了严格的数学分析，揭示了系统丰富的稳态模式形成机制，对理解自组织群体行为有重要意义

title: On the de Thélin eigenvalue problem and Landesman-Lazer conditions for quasilinear systems
summary:
In this paper we prove that the smallest eigenvalue $λ_1$ of the eigenvalue problem for a quasilinear elliptic systems introduced by de Thélin in \cite{DT}, is not only simple (in a suitable sense), but also isolated.
  Moreover, we characterize variationally a sequence $\{λ_k\}_k$ of eigenvalues, taking into account a suitable deformation lemma for $C^1$ submanifolds proved in \cite{BON}. Furthermore we prove the existence of a weak solution for a quasilinear elliptic systems in resonance around $λ_1$, under new sufficient Landesman-Lazer type conditions, extending the results by Arcoya and Orsina \cite{AO}.

AI.tldr: 证明了de Thélin引入的拟线性椭圆系统特征值问题的最小特征值λ₁不仅是简单的，而且是孤立的，并在λ₁附近共振条件下建立了弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究de Thélin引入的拟线性椭圆系统特征值问题，特别是最小特征值λ₁的性质，以及在共振条件下解的存在性问题
AI.techniques: 使用C¹子流形形变引理、变分方法、Landesman-Lazer型条件、特征值序列的变分刻画
AI.main_theorems: 1. λ₁的简单性和孤立性；2. 特征值序列{λ_k}的变分刻画；3. 在λ₁附近共振条件下拟线性椭圆系统弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了Arcoya和Orsina的结果，为拟线性椭圆系统在共振条件下的研究提供了新的理论框架和存在性条件

title: On the stability of solutions to non-Newtonian Navier--Stokes--Fourier-like systems in the supercritical case
summary:
We consider a three-dimensional domain occupied by a homogeneous, incompressible, non-Newtonian, heat-conducting fluid with prescribed nonuniform temperature on the boundary and no-slip boundary conditions for the velocity. No external body forces are assumed. The constitutive relation for the Cauchy stress tensor is assumed in a general form that includes, in particular, the power-law and Ladyzhenskaya models with the power-law exponent in the range where neither regularity, uniqueness, nor the validity of the energy equality is known to hold.
  Nevertheless, we introduce a novel concept of solution suitable for this setting, which enables us to establish the existence of global-in-time solutions for arbitrary physically relevant initial data. A remarkable feature of this formulation is that the steady-state solution is nonlinearly stable: every such solution converges, in a suitable sense, to the steady state as time tends to infinity. This provides the first result that combines existence with long-time stability in this physically relevant yet mathematically challenging regime.

AI.tldr: 提出了三维非牛顿热传导流体在边界温度非均匀条件下的新型解概念，首次在该数学困难区域中同时建立了全局存在性和长时间稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究三维均匀不可压缩非牛顿热传导流体在边界温度非均匀且无外力条件下的动力学行为，该问题在幂律指数特定范围内既缺乏正则性、唯一性，也无法保证能量等式成立，是数学上极具挑战性的物理相关模型
AI.techniques: 引入了适用于该困难区域的新型解概念，结合了非牛顿流体力学和热传导理论，发展了处理幂律模型和Ladyzhenskaya模型在临界指数范围内的分析框架
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了任意物理相关初值条件下全局时间解的存在性；2) 证明了稳态解的非线性稳定性：所有解在适当意义下随时间趋于无穷大时收敛到稳态；3) 首次在该困难区域中同时获得存在性和长时间稳定性结果
AI.significance: 这是首次在非牛顿热传导流体模型中同时解决存在性和稳定性问题，为处理数学困难但物理相关的流体模型提供了新框架，对非牛顿流体力学和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Stability inequalities for one-phase cones
summary: We obtain strict stability inequalities for homogeneous solutions of the one-phase Bernoulli problem. We prove that in dimension $7$ and above, cohomogeneity one solutions with bi-orthogonal symmetry are strictly stable. As a consequence, we obtain a bound on the first eigenvalue and the decay rates of Jacobi fields, with applications to the generic regularity of the one-phase problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了7维及以上具有双正交对称性的齐次一相Bernoulli问题解的严格稳定性不等式
AI.motivation: 研究一相Bernoulli问题的齐次解的稳定性，该问题在自由边界问题中具有基础重要性，稳定性分析对于理解解的几何性质和正则性至关重要
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、稳定性不等式、Jacobi场分析、对称性约化（双正交对称性和余齐次一结构）以及特征值估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在7维及以上维度，具有双正交对称性的余齐次一解是严格稳定的；2. 获得了第一特征值的界；3. 推导了Jacobi场的衰减率
AI.significance: 为一相Bernoulli问题的泛函正则性提供了理论基础，建立了高维稳定性与几何对称性之间的联系，对自由边界问题的正则性理论有重要贡献
